items.name: from_file
items.signature: pub fn from_file(path: &Path) -> Result<AppSettings, Box<dyn std::error::Error>>
items.doc: Deserializes settings from a TOML file at the given path.

items.name: from_file_or_default
items.doc: Load from file, falling back to defaults if the file is absent or unparseable.

items.name: to_file
items.signature: pub fn to_file(settings: &AppSettings, path: &Path) -> Result<(), Box<dyn std::error::Error>>
items.doc: Serializes settings to a TOML file, creating parent directories if needed.
